Title: Two tandem R2R3 MYB transcription factor genes cooperatively regulate anthocyanin accumulation in potato tuber flesh

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Determines pigmented tuber flesh colour and contributes to nutritional quality
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: transcriptional activation; protein–protein interaction with bHLH cofactor
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates StMYB210 transcription from the Pf haplotype promoter; activates StbHLH1 promoter; activates StDFR and StF3H promoters, with stronger activation when co-expressed with StbHLH1
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Pf haplotype context with 1.7-kb insertion in StMYB210 promoter; flesh-colour associated locus on chromosome 10
Regulation_Genes.Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation: Feedforward activation of StMYB210 and StbHLH1 within the anthocyanin regulatory module
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Forms regulatory complexes with StbHLH1; also interacts with StMYB210
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Highly expressed in red tuber flesh; low or rare expression in white flesh; increased in Pf/Pf tuber flesh compared with pf/pf
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: 35S constitutive promoter for effector constructs; native StMYB210, StbHLH1, StDFR and StF3H promoters assayed
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: GWAS; expression profiling by RNA-seq and RT-qPCR; CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; dual-luciferase assay; yeast one-hybrid; EMSA; yeast two-hybrid; pull-down; LCI; BiFC
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes anthocyanin accumulation and red/purple tuber flesh; knockout causes altered tuber flesh colour and reduces downstream anthocyanin pathway gene expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Key upstream MYB activator at the Pf locus that directly induces StMYB210 from the insertion-containing promoter haplotype and cooperates with StbHLH1 to drive anthocyanin biosynthesis
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. StMYB200 was identified within the Pf locus and is highly expressed in red flesh but barely in white flesh. 2. CRISPR knockout altered tuber flesh colour and downregulated anthocyanin structural genes. 3. StMYB200 directly binds MBS1 in the 1.7-kb insertion of the StMYB210 promoter and activates StMYB210 transcription only from the Pf haplotype. 4. StMYB200 activates StbHLH1 and interacts with both StbHLH1 and StMYB210. 5. StMYB200 activates StDFR and StF3H promoters, especially together with StbHLH1.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful target for molecular breeding of pigmented potato; likely most effective when deployed with the Pf-associated StMYB210 promoter insertion and compatible bHLH partner activity
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Knockout of StMYB200 did not reduce its own transcript level but reduced StMYB210 expression; discussed previously as StMYBA1/Stan3.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Determines pigmented tuber flesh colour and contributes to nutritional quality
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: transcriptional activation; positive autoregulation; protein–protein interaction with bHLH cofactor
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Activates its own promoter from the Pf haplotype by binding MBS1 and MBS2 within the 1.7-kb insertion; activates StbHLH1 promoter; activates StDFR and StF3H promoters, enhanced with StbHLH1
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Activated by StMYB200 and by the presence of the 1.7-kb insertion in its promoter; Pf haplotype
Regulation_Genes.Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation: Positive autoregulation; part of feedforward circuit with StMYB200 and StbHLH1
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Forms regulatory complexes with StbHLH1; also interacts with StMYB200
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Highly expressed in red tuber flesh; low or absent in white flesh; higher in Pf/Pf than pf/pf; expression tracks with presence of 1.7-kb promoter insertion
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: 35S constitutive promoter for effector constructs; native StMYB210, StbHLH1, StDFR and StF3H promoters assayed
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: GWAS; expression profiling by RNA-seq, RT-qPCR and endpoint RT-PCR; CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; promoter haplotype analysis; dual-luciferase assay; yeast one-hybrid; EMSA; yeast two-hybrid; pull-down; LCI; BiFC
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes anthocyanin accumulation and pigmented tuber flesh; knockout converts red flesh to white/altered flesh colour and lowers anthocyanin pathway gene expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Central MYB determinant whose Pf-haplotype promoter insertion enables high expression and anthocyanin accumulation in tuber flesh
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. StMYB210 is a Pf-locus candidate highly expressed in red flesh and associated with colourful-flesh accessions. 2. CRISPR knockout altered tuber flesh colour and reduced expression of anthocyanin structural genes. 3. StMYB210 positively regulates its own transcription by directly binding MBS1 and MBS2 within the 1.7-kb Pf-haplotype promoter insertion. 4. StMYB210 expression is activated by StMYB200 and correlates with the promoter insertion across accessions. 5. StMYB210 interacts with StbHLH1 and StMYB200 and activates StDFR and StF3H promoters.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: High-value marker and engineering target for colourful-flesh potato breeding; the 1.7-kb promoter insertion is useful for marker-assisted selection and cis-regulatory engineering
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Also referred to as StAN1/Stan2 in previous literature; expression alone may be insufficient for flesh pigmentation if structural genes or other regulators are limiting.

Regulation_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Determines pigmented tuber flesh colour and contributes to nutritional quality
Regulation_Genes.Metabolic_Process_Controlled: anthocyanin biosynthesis gene activation as MYB cofactor
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: transcriptional co-activation through protein complex formation with MYB factors
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Required for full activation of StDFR and StF3H together with StMYB200 or StMYB210; knockout lowers StDFR expression; affects its own expression and increases StMYB200 expression when disrupted
Regulation_Genes.Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation: Participates in regulatory feedback affecting its own expression and StMYB200 expression
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Forms MYB–bHLH regulatory complexes with StMYB200 and StMYB210
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Expressed in pigmented flesh; absent in StMYB200ko1 and StMYB210ko1; barely expressed in pf/pf lines
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: 35S constitutive promoter for effector constructs; native StbHLH1, StDFR and StF3H promoters assayed
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNA-seq; RT-qPCR; CRISPR/Cas9 knockout; dual-luciferase assay; yeast two-hybrid; pull-down; LCI; BiFC
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Required for anthocyanin accumulation in tuber flesh; knockout causes white-flesh tubers and reduced StDFR expression
Regulation_Genes.Decisive_Influence_on_Target_Product: Essential bHLH co-regulator that is activated by both MYBs and enables strong activation of anthocyanin structural genes in tuber flesh
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. StbHLH1 expression depends on StMYB200 and StMYB210 activity and is low in non-pigmented genotypes. 2. StMYB200 and StMYB210 activate the StbHLH1 promoter. 3. CRISPR knockout of StbHLH1 causes white tuber flesh and reduced StDFR expression. 4. StbHLH1 physically interacts with StMYB200 and StMYB210. 5. Co-expression with either MYB enhances activation of StDFR and StF3H promoters.
Regulation_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Should be considered as a necessary partner in anthocyanin engineering or stacking strategies with StMYB200/StMYB210
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: StbHLH1 alone did not significantly activate StDFR promoter in dual-LUC; acts primarily as cofactor. Knockout increased StMYB200 expression without changing StMYB210.
